name: TGS x FFMPEG
description: Procesamiento de video en el navegador con FFmpeg.wasm

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src https://cdn.jsdelivr.net blob:; object-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:;
